questions.text: What is the primary benefit of time-travel debugging in stateful agent graphs?
options: To roll back execution state to any past checkpoint step to inspect variables or fork execution paths.
To speed up token generation rates.
questions.correct_answer: To roll back execution state to any past checkpoint step to inspect variables or fork execution paths.
questions.explanation: Time-travel debugging loads past checkpoint IDs, allowing developers to inspect or resume execution from previous states.
